# ksh SDLC skills (Copilot)

This project ships the `ksh` SDLC prompts in `.github/prompts/`. Type `/ksh`
in Copilot Chat to run the guided flow, or `/ksh-spec`, `/ksh-plan`,
`/ksh-code`, `/ksh-test`, `/ksh-review`, `/ksh-doc`, `/ksh-fix` for a single
step. Human approval gates after spec, plan, and review are mandatory - wait for
the developer to approve before continuing. Model routing is Claude-only and does
not apply here.
